mapper.sql: shop_id, product_no, cover_image, gallery_images, stock, name, specification, unit, price, open_discount, discount_num, open_discount_time, discount_time, amount, sort, status, scheduled_time, is_virtual, time_limit, detail, remark
mapper.update:
UPDATE `product`
shop_id = #{data.shopId},
product_no = #{data.productNo},
cover_image = #{data.coverImage},
gallery_images = #{data.galleryImages},
stock = #{data.stock},
name = #{data.name},
specification = #{data.specification},
unit = #{data.unit},
price = #{data.price},
open_discount = #{data.openDiscount},
discount_num = #{data.discountNum},
open_discount_time = #{data.openDiscountTime},
discount_time = #{data.discountTime},
amount = #{data.amount},
sort = #{data.sort},
status = #{data.status},
scheduled_time = #{data.scheduledTime},
is_virtual = #{data.isVirtual},
time_limit = #{data.timeLimit},
detail = #{data.detail},
remark = #{data.remark},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{data.id} AND delete_time IS NULL

UPDATE product SET delete_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product a LEFT JOIN product_category_relation b ON a.id = b.product_id AND b.delete_time IS NULL WHERE b.category_id = #{categoryId} AND a.delete_time IS NULL
mapper.update:
UPDATE product SET
`stock` = `stock` + ${stock}, `sale_num` = `sale_num` + ${saleNum},
WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT p.* FROM `product` p INNER JOIN `product_category_relation` r ON p.id = r.product_id
p.delete_time IS NULL
AND p.shop_id = #{param.searchId}
AND r.category_id IN
#{item}
AND delete_time IS NULL
ORDER BY p.sort DESC, p.id DESC
select count(1) from product where id = #{deleteId} AND delete_time IS NULL

SELECT p.id,p.shop_id,p.product_no,p.cover_image,p.gallery_images as gallery_images_str,p.stock,p.name, p.specification,p.unit,p.price,p.open_discount,p.discount_num,p.open_discount_time,p.discount_time, p.amount,p.sort,p.is_virtual,p.time_limit,p.sale_num FROM `product` p
AND p.shop_id = #{param.searchId}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_category_relation pcr WHERE pcr.product_id = p.id AND pcr.category_id = #{param.searchField1} )
AND p.product_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.searchStrField1}, '%')
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.searchStrField2}, '%')
AND (p.status = 1 OR (p.status = 3 AND p.scheduled_time <= NOW())) AND p.delete_time IS NULL
ORDER BY p.sort DESC, p.id DESC
